title: GitHub Issues
command: pane_path=$(tmux display-message -p '#{pane_current_path}'); repo_root=$(git -C "$pane_path" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || { printf '[{"icon":"","title":"Not a Git repository","description":"Open tmux-palette from a Git worktree","action":{"shell":":"}}]\n'; exit 0; }; cd "$repo_root" && gh issue list --limit 50 --json number,title,state,labels,author --jq '[.[] | {icon: "", title: ("#" + (.number|tostring) + " " + .title), description: ((([.labels[].name] | join(", ")) // "") + (if .author.login then " by " + .author.login else "" end)), action: {shell: ("gh issue view " + (.number|tostring) + " --web")}}]'
